product_updates.title: xAI fired an engineer who raised alarms about Grok safety, new lawsuit claims
product_updates.content: A former xAI engineer is suing the company and SpaceX, alleging he was fired for raising AI safety concerns about Grok days before SpaceX's historic IPO.

product_updates.title: Fresh off bond sale, Amazon borrows $17.5B from banks as AI spending continues
product_updates.content: Companies are burning through exorbitant sums of money to keep pace in the AI arms race. Debt is climbing.

product_updates.title: ‘AI-pilled’ firms spend $7,500 per employee each month on AI
product_updates.content: The most AI-obsessed firms are spending roughly $7,500 monthly per employee on AI, per Ramp AI Index. That's not more than an engineer's salary — yet.

product_updates.title: How memory tools can make AI models worse
product_updates.content: New research suggests that AI memory systems can degrade model performance and encourage sycophantic tendencies.

product_updates.title: Cybersecurity researchers aren’t happy about the guardrails on Anthropic’s Fable
product_updates.content: Cybersecurity researchers are complaining that Anthropic's new model Fable has guardrails that are too strict for any cybersecurity work.

product_updates.title: Datadog veterans launch AI coding startup Niteshift on a bet against Big AI lock-in
product_updates.content: AI coding agent startup Niteshift has raised a $7 million seed round from a who's who of angels. It's betting companies will want power over, not lock-in with model makers.

product_updates.title: The three hard-tech moonshots fueling SpaceX’s unbelievable IPO
product_updates.content: Most of the value in SpaceX's IPO is effectively a call option on the company's ambitious space data center plans.

product_updates.title: Warner Music acquires AI attribution startup Sureel AI
product_updates.content: Through the acquisition, WMG aims to better track when its artists' work is used in AI-generated content or for training AI models.

product_updates.title: Jedify raises $24M to help companies arm AI agents with context on their business
product_updates.content: The funding round was led by Norwest, with participation from S Capital VC, Cerca Partners, and Oceans Ventures. Snowflake Ventures also participated as a strategic investor.

product_updates.title: Decart’s new world model can simulate hours of photorealistic driving — with some caveats
product_updates.content: Decart is launching Oasis 3, a real-time world model that generates photorealistic driving environments for autonomous vehicle testing, now available via API for developers to build on.

technical_breakthroughs.title: The Download: the “steroid olympics” and a safer Mythos
technical_breakthroughs.content: This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology. The “steroid olympics” were a circus—and a window into our culture —Amit Katwala A couple of weeks ago, at a $50 million arena built in a casino parking lot in…

technical_breakthroughs.title: The “steroid olympics” were a circus—and a window into our culture
technical_breakthroughs.content: Testosterone. Methenolone. Nandrolone. Human growth hormone and EPO. Meldonium, modafinil, and mixed amphetamine salts. Clomiphene, anastrozole, levothyroxine, and liothyronine. Patches and capsules, creams and pills. A whole galaxy of steroids, metabolic modulators, and synthetic hormones coursi…
